zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Wadham於大約1495年出生時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Wadham24歲，母親Jane Hill18歲。她於大約1512年與Sir Richard Chudleigh在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Wadham was born about 1495, her father, Sir Nicholas Wadham, was 24 and her mother, Jane Hill, was 18. She married Sir Richard Chudleigh about 1512, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Wadham(이)가 대략 1495년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Wadham(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Hill(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1512년 영국에서 Sir Richard Chudleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.
